hooks.command: cd '/c/Users/carca/.gemini/antigravity/scratch' && if [ -n "$(git status --short)" ]; then git add -A && CHANGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only | head -5 | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/ $//') && SUMMARY=$(git diff --cached --stat | tail -1) && git commit -m "Auto-commit: $CHANGED — $SUMMARY"; fi
